import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useCart } from '../../Context/CartContext'; import './CartView.css'; const CartView = () => { const { cart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, total, clearCart } = useCart(); if (cart.length === 0) { return (

Tu carrito está vacío

Parece que aún no has agregado nada.

Ir a comprar
); } console.log (cart) return (

Tu Carrito

{cart.map(item => (

{item.name}

${item.price.toFixed(2)}
{item.quantity}
${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}
))}

Resumen

Subtotal ${total.toFixed(2)}
Envío Gratis
Total ${total.toFixed(2)}
); }; export default CartView;
